Summer Advising Worksheet

Yuanting Lu

June, 2020

Welcome to the summer advising! Let’s get started with reviewing your current course schedule:

  • Go to my.mercer.edu.
  • Login your student account.
  • On the left sidebar, expand Academics, then click My Class Schedule. The page shows
    1. Summary of all the courses you are currently enrolled in.
    2. A calendar-style time sheet for all your classes. (Choose Week 3 for a complete preview because no class is currently scheduled for Mondays on Week 1 and Week 2.)

Degree Overview

GenEd Checklist

This is Mercer University Foundational Studies (General Education) checklist for the academic year 2019-2020. The checklist for the academic year 2020-2021 will be available soon on the web page https://liberalarts.mercer.edu/resources/student-resources/. The difference from year to year is typically very small.

You are expected to enroll in one of the two General Education tracks (your preference):

  • INT: the Integrative program
  • GBK: the Great Book program.

Catalog

This is Mercer University catalog for the academic year 2019-2020. The catalog for the academic year 2020-2021 will be available soon on the web page https://registrar.mercer.edu/macon/catalogs.cfm. The catalog can pretty much answer ALL your questions regarding academics at Mercer.

  • Click on College of Liberal Arts on the left sidebar.
  • Then move down 12 more rows on the sidebar to find ACADEMIC DEPARTMENTS.
  • Finally, click on your major/minor department to see the requirements and course offerings.

Pre-Health Professions

Please visit Academic Advising Services (AAS) website.

  • Select your pre-health profession on AAS’s website to see the page for the specific track..
  • Click on Scheduling of pre-XXXX Coursework to see suggested schedules.

Searching for classes

This panel displays the real time class meeting schedule at Mercer University. Please be patient, it takes a while for this panel to show up and update. Bookmark the original link https://adminapps.mercer.edu/classroomsched/default.aspx?C=M for future reference.

To search for a class:

  • Select Term: 2020 Fall
  • Type in a course code. For example, MAT 191.
  • The third column is the section number. Be sure to read all rows with the same section number.
  • Don’t forget to check the column # of Seats Available.
  • If there are multiple pages in the search result, navigate to other pages by clicking on the page numbers in the botton of the table.
